[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001111 5
1 00010100 2
2 10010101 4
3 11110000 4
4 00011100 3
5 11100110 5
6 00001000 1
7 01000100 2

12 21 10010100 3
23 32 00000100 1
34 43 01000110 3
45 54 00000000 a
56 65 00000000 a
67 76 01000000 1
70 07 01010010 3

13 31 00001101 3
24 42 10100100 3
35 53 00001000 1 match 6
46 64 01000100 2 match 7
57 75 00000000 a
60 06 01000000 1
71 17 00010001 2

25 52 00000000 a

47 74 01000010 2
50 05 00000000 a
61 16 00000100 1
72 27 00010000 1
